Population memetics is the study of memes, their presence in a population, and things which change their presence in a population

It is the most dominant area of [[memetics]] while [[phenotypic memetics]] is understudied.

[[Memetic viruses]] and [[Hydroplane|Hydroplanes]] and their spreading, in addition to spreading of [[beneficial memeplexes]] are all studied in population memetics

== See Also ==

* [[Population genetics]]
* [[Population scenetics]]

[[Category:Memetics]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Population memetics]]
[[Category:Pages]]
